name: @day8/re-frame2-mcp-conformance
description: End-to-end MCP-client conformance harness for re-frame2 MCP servers (pair2-mcp, story-mcp). Drives each server via the official @modelcontextprotocol/sdk Client so a real MCP-aware consumer (not a hand-rolled JSON-RPC shim) exercises the handshake, tool catalogue, and one canonical workflow per server.
